t-buli: ⚠️ DANGER: Pyrophoric. Ignites spontaneously in air. Requires Schlenk techniques.
sodium hydride: ⚠️ DANGER: Water-reactive. Releases flammable hydrogen gas. Potential for fire/explosion.
osmium tetroxide: ⚠️ DANGER: Highly volatile and acutely toxic to eyes and lungs. Use in dedicated hood.
thionyl chloride: ⚠️ DANGER: Corrosive and toxic. Reacts violently with water to release HCl and SO2 gas.
benzene: ⚠️ WARNING: Known human carcinogen. Avoid inhalation and skin contact.
sodium cyanide: ⚠️ DANGER: Acutely toxic. Inhibits cellular respiration. Keep away from acids.
hf: ⚠️ DANGER: Hydrofluoric acid. Causes deep, painless tissue destruction and systemic calcium depletion.
n-butyllithium: ⚠️ DANGER: Pyrophoric and highly corrosive base.
diazomethane: ⚠️ DANGER: Highly explosive and acutely toxic gas. Requires specialized glassware (Ace).
